task_completion.description: Verify that a modifier group named 'PIZZA TOPPINGS' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'PIZZA TOPPINGS' in the Modifier Group Explorer or a similar list of modifier groups in the Floreant POS Back Office.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 8 specific pizza modifiers with their correct prices are created and associated with the 'PIZZA TOPPINGS' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the modifiers (EXTRA CHEESE $1.50, MUSHROOMS $0.75, PEPPERONI $1.25, ONIONS $0.50, PEPPERS $0.75, OLIVES $0.50, ANCHOVIES $0.75, SAUSAGE $1.25) in the Modifier Explorer, or inside the 'PIZZA TOPPINGS' modifier group configuration window.

task_completion.description: Verify that a modifier group named 'BURGER ADD-ONS' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'BURGER ADD-ONS' in the Modifier Group Explorer or a similar list of modifier groups.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 5 specific burger modifiers with their correct prices are created and associated with the 'BURGER ADD-ONS' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the modifiers (AVOCADO $1.50, BACON $1.25, FRIED EGG $1.00, EXTRA PATTY $3.00, JALAPENOS $0.50) in the Modifier Explorer, or inside the 'BURGER ADD-ONS' modifier group configuration window.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'PIZZA TOPPINGS' modifier group is assigned to at least one menu item in the PIZZA category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Menu Item configuration window for a pizza item (e.g., in the Menu Item Explorer) showing 'PIZZA TOPPINGS' added to its list of modifier groups.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Floreant POS graphical user interface to configure the modifiers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Floreant POS Back Office windows (Modifier Explorer, Menu Item Explorer, etc.) rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should display genuine application dialogs, buttons, and tables from Floreant POS, not a text editor or a mock-up.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating two modifier groups in Floreant POS. 1) 'PIZZA TOPPINGS' with 8 modifiers: EXTRA CHEESE ($1.50), MUSHROOMS ($0.75), PEPPERONI ($1.25), ONIONS ($0.50), PEPPERS ($0.75), OLIVES ($0.50), ANCHOVIES ($0.75), SAUSAGE ($1.25). 2) 'BURGER ADD-ONS' with 5 modifiers: AVOCADO ($1.50), BACON ($1.25), FRIED EGG ($1.00), EXTRA PATTY ($3.00), JALAPENOS ($0.50). Additionally, the 'PIZZA TOPPINGS' group must be assigned to at least one item in the PIZZA menu category.
